report.name: Warehouse Inefficiency Analysis - Time Loss Categories

chartData.Description: Time lost due to poor organization and lack of location system - needs warehouse layout optimization
Excessive travel between pick locations - requires pick path optimization and zone reorganization
WMS system crashes and slow performance - IT infrastructure upgrade needed
Forklift and scanner availability issues - equipment utilization review required
Incorrect pick lists and inventory records - data accuracy improvement needed
Extended breaks affecting productivity - time management training required
High turnover causing repeated training cycles - retention strategy needed

highlightsData.title: Incomplete Analysis Coverage
highlightsData.content: Current Pareto analysis only captures 569 hours of documented time loss. Estimates suggest an additional 200-300 hours of undocumented inefficiencies exist, indicating need for comprehensive time study to capture complete picture.

attachments.name: incomplete_data_analysis.jpg
attachments.description: Data collection gaps and improvement areas

highlightsData.title: Layout Inefficiency Dominance
highlightsData.content: Top two categories (Searching and Walking) represent 52.4% of time loss, both directly related to warehouse layout and organization. This suggests fundamental redesign opportunity rather than incremental improvements.

highlightsData.title: Technology Gap Impact
highlightsData.content: System downtime (15.6% of losses) combined with documentation errors (7.9%) reveals technology infrastructure inadequacy. Current WMS is 8 years old and lacks modern optimization features.

actionItems.title: Conduct Comprehensive Time and Motion Study
actionItems.description: Perform detailed analysis of all warehouse activities over 2-week period to capture complete inefficiency picture. Include hidden wastes like double handling and rework.

attachments.name: time_study_methodology.jpg
attachments.description: Time and motion study methodology plan

actionItems.title: Implement ABC Location Strategy
actionItems.description: Reorganize warehouse using ABC analysis to place high-velocity items in golden zones. Expected to reduce search time by 60% and walking distance by 40%.

actionItems.title: Pilot Modern WMS Module
actionItems.description: Test cloud-based WMS module with real-time optimization features in one warehouse zone. Include pick path optimization and mobile device integration.

actionItems.title: Develop Visual Management System
actionItems.description: Create color-coded zones, aisle markers, and location labels to reduce search time. Include QR codes for instant location verification.
